analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet by Zakharova accuses Poland (Warsaw) of pursuing selfish goals, ignoring fair competition and EU consumers’ interests, and undermining European energy and environmental security regarding Nord Stream 2. Evaluation: RU1 (The West and their allies are immoral, hostile and decadent) – Applicable. The tweet portrays a Western ally (Poland) as acting selfishly, disregarding fair competition and consumer interests, and harming European security, which fits depicting a Western actor as immoral/hostile. RU2 – Not supported; no promotion of an alternative Russian-led system or multilateralism. RU3 – Not supported; it doesn’t frame Russia as a benevolent partner. RU4 – Not relevant; no historical pride content. RU5 – Not supported; no claim of Russian forefront achievements. RU6 – Not relevant; no cultural/nature content. Conclusion: The tweet promotes RU1.
